Upon every hit Blackmist's victims must successfully resist it's mist enchantment  or risk being temporary blinded by it.
This wide belt is made of thick leather and studded with iron. It grants the wearer the strength of a giant and the ability to make devastating melee attacks.

This wide belt is made of thick leather and studded with iron. It grants the wearer the strength of a giant and the ability to make devastating melee attacks.

Scythes of this sort are truly awesome instruments of indifferent murder, created by the fanatical followers of Iyachtu Xvim just before his transformation and the rebirth of Bane. The faithful of the New Darkness wanted to ensure that no creature was beyond the touch of his fury, and even the name shows disdain for the gods that hold true domain over murder and death, former mortals that the Godson claimed were unworthy.
